data.reasoning: Both models skipped audit due to PKGBUILD being incorrectly classified as binary. No files were reviewed, making safety assessment impossible.
coverage_issues: Potential install hooks or source files not scanned due to initial failure
false_negatives: All risks in PKGBUILD were missed (build/install logic)
Potential .install scripts or referenced executables not examined
learnings: Improve binary file detection: PKGBUILDs should never be binary. Add fallback to hexdump/strings analysis
Prioritize PKGBUILD review even if initial parse fails
Implement error recovery: Continue scanning other critical files (e.g., *.install) after PKGBUILD failure
Enhance logging for skipped files to include file metadata (size, headers)
